allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Asset_Library\\Tiny RPG Character Asset Pack v1.02 -Full 15 Characters" -Recurse | Where-Object {$_.Extension -eq ".png"} | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Size";Expression={$_.Length}} | Group-Object Name | ForEach-Object {Write-Host "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\) files, Size: $\($_.Group[0].Size\)"})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Asset_Library\\Tiny RPG Character Asset Pack v1.03b -Full 20 Characters" -Recurse | Where-Object {$_.Extension -eq ".png"} | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Size";Expression={$_.Length}} | Group-Object Name | ForEach-Object {Write-Host "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\) files, Size: $\($_.Group[0].Size\)"} | Sort-Object)
